headline: Analog Devices (ADI) Is Down 6.5% After Margin Plan And AI ATE Tailwind Commentary - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In early March 2026, Analog Devices used its appearance at Morgan Stanley’s Technology, Media & Telecom Conference to outline plans to lift gross margins from 71% to 74% and add 200 basis points to operating margins in fiscal Q2, while highlighting nine straight quarters of above-seasonal performance in ATE, aerospace, and automotive. Management also emphasized that rising AI capital spending could be a meaningful tailwind for its ATE business, suggesting an important link between AI...
